fields.name: delegation
fields.description: Delegation that has been enqueued for inclusion (mock)

fields.name: from
fields.description: Public key of sender of payment

fields.name: to
fields.description: Public key of recipient of payment

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Amount of MINA to send to receiver

fields.name: fee
fields.description: Fee amount in order to send payment

fields.name: validUntil
fields.description: The global slot since genesis after which this transaction cannot be applied

fields.name: memo
fields.description: Short arbitrary message provided by the sender

fields.name: nonce
fields.description: Should only be set when cancelling transactions, otherwise a nonce is determined automatically

inputFields.name: from
inputFields.description: Public key of sender of payment

inputFields.name: to
inputFields.description: Public key of recipient of payment

inputFields.name: amount
inputFields.description: Amount of MINA to send to receiver

inputFields.name: fee
inputFields.description: Fee amount in order to send payment

inputFields.name: validUntil
inputFields.description: The global slot since genesis after which this transaction cannot be applied

inputFields.name: memo
inputFields.description: Short arbitrary message provided by the sender

inputFields.name: nonce
inputFields.description: Should only be set when cancelling transactions, otherwise a nonce is determined automatically

types.name: SignatureInput
types.description: A cryptographic signature -- you must provide either field+scalar or rawSignature

fields.name: rawSignature
fields.description: Raw encoded signature

fields.name: scalar
fields.description: Scalar component of signature

fields.name: field
fields.description: Field component of signature

fields.name: payment
fields.description: Payment that has been enqueued for inclusion (mock)

fields.name: startFilteredLog
fields.description: Start filtering and tracing the log of the daemon (mock: always succeeds)

fields.name: sendPayment
fields.description: Send a payment (mock: returns a canned, deterministic synthetic tx)

args.name: signature
args.description: If a signature is provided, this transaction is considered signed and will be broadcasted to the network without requiring a private key

fields.name: sendDelegation
fields.description: Change your delegate by sending a transaction (mock: returns canned synthetic tx)

types.name: Globalslot
types.description: String representation of a global slot

enumValues.name: INCLUDED
enumValues.description: A transaction that is on the longest chain

enumValues.name: PENDING
enumValues.description: A transaction either in the transition frontier or in transaction pool but is not on the longest chain

enumValues.name: UNKNOWN
enumValues.description: The transaction has either reached finality or is unknown

types.name: Amount
types.description: String representation of a payment amount

types.name: Fee
types.description: String representation of a transaction fee

types.name: GenesisConstants
types.description: Constants used to configure the genesis ledger (mock)

types.name: AccountNonce
types.description: Account nonce, represented as a string

types.name: TokenId
types.description: String representation of a token's UInt64 identifier

fields.name: token
fields.description: Alias for tokenId

fields.name: syncStatus
fields.description: Network sync status (mock)

fields.name: daemonStatus
fields.description: Get running daemon status (mock)

fields.name: version
fields.description: The version of the node (mock)

fields.name: timeOffset
fields.description: The time offset in seconds used to convert real time to slots (mock)

fields.name: account
fields.description: Find any account via a public key and token id (mock)

args.name: token
args.description: Token id of account (defaults to MINA token)

fields.name: wallet
fields.description: Find any wallet via a public key (mock; alias for account)

fields.name: accounts
fields.description: Find all accounts for a given public key (mock; returns at most 1)

fields.name: tokenOwner
fields.description: Find the account that owns a given token (mock: always the block producer)

fields.name: tokenAccounts
fields.description: Find all accounts for a given token (mock: returns every persona account)

fields.name: genesisConstants
fields.description: Constants used to determine genesis state (mock)

fields.name: transactionStatus
fields.description: Get the status of a transaction (mock)

fields.name: pooledUserCommands
fields.description: Get all the scheduled user commands for a specified sender that the current daemon sees in their mempool (mock: returns all persona mempool entries, ignores filters)
